nasb.text: The dead will not live, the departed spirits will not rise; Therefore You have punished and destroyed them, And You have wiped out all remembrance of them.

esv.text: They are dead, they will not live; they are shades, they will not arise; to that end you have visited them with destruction and wiped out all remembrance of them.

cnv.text: 死去的不能再活，離世的不能再起來， 因為你懲罰他們，消滅了他們， 使他們完全不再被記念。

ccb.text: 他们都已死去，再不能复生， 逝去的灵魂不能回来。 因为你惩罚他们，毁灭他们， 使他们被人彻底遗忘。

csbs.text: 死人不能活过来， 阴魂不能起来； 因为你惩罚、除灭了他们， 使他们的一切名号都消亡了。
